messages.message: Now that's a power-up!
SNIKI PRO MAXXX!!!
balanced game btw
lessgoooooooo
NERF INCOMING CALLED IT
the balance team just quit
this is NOT in the patch notes
broken? maybe. fun? absolutely
this single handedly changes the meta
this would get banned in tournament play
those numbers are NOT humanely possible
stat check just went off the charts
power creep at its absolute finest
calling an emergency balance meeting
moving straight to S tier, no contest
stacking buffs like its nothing
this is genuinely game breaking
the RNG gods have blessed him today
maxed out the whole skill tree already?
no cooldowns, no mercy
loot goblin mode officially activated
DPS just broke my calculator
100% crit chance is NOT fair
hes basically lightning now
armor rating is in the thousands now
infinite mana pool detected
leveling up faster than i can read chat
thats a legendary drop if ive ever seen one
the passive alone is busted
that active skill just deleted the cooldown bar
the synergy between these buffs is unreal
is this basically god mode now
i dont think anything can touch him now
the scaling on this is absolutely nuts
enhancement level: maximum overdrive
unlocked an upgrade i didnt even know existed
thats the biggest power spike ive seen all stream

full transformation sequence, lets go
ascension arc has officially begun
power level: its over 9000
collecting buff cards like its a TCG now

absolute min maxer behavior and i love it

fully enchanted, this is unfair now
buff overload, system cant even keep up

all that grinding finally paying off big time

that skill combo was actually insane
chaining buffs back to back, smart play
another power up pickup, no way
elite status unlocked, officially OP
ranking up faster than the leaderboard can update
damage multiplier just doubled again
resistance stats are basically maxed now
regen rate just got absolutely busted
crit multiplier going absolutely insane
buff stack literally overflowing the UI
power core fully unlocked, this is wild
evolution phase 2 just kicked in
mythic drop confirmed, screenshot this
god tier status achieved unironically
the stat sheet alone is terrifying now
buffs are literally cascading at this point
power level peaking right in front of us
